# AEO Trivector

> An independent research program in non-commutative geometry, Clifford algebra, and the mathematics of self-encoding dynamics.

Principal: Jared D. Dunahay
ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0004-5735-2872
Affiliation: AEO Trivector LLC, Bedford, NH
Academic correspondence: jared@trivector.ai
General contact: link@trivector.ai

## Pages

- [Manifold (overview)](https://aeotrivector.com/manifold): The three-pillar framing — Structure, Dynamics, Integration.
- [Research](https://aeotrivector.com/research): Preprints, code, citations.
- [Mathematics](https://aeotrivector.com/mathematics): Constraint hierarchy, dimension selection, graded hypertorus T⁸.
- [About](https://aeotrivector.com/about): Principal investigator, affiliation, identity.
- [Contact](https://aeotrivector.com/contact): Correspondence.

## Research focus

- Self-encoding dynamics via the Lambert W function: μ = W(1) = 0.567143
- Dimension selection: x*(W(1)) = 3.006 — three spatial dimensions emerge uniquely
- Graded hypertorus T⁸ = S¹ × T³ × T³ × S¹ indexed by Cl(3,0)
- Spectral triples, non-commutative geometry, Clifford algebra
- Architecture-dependent spectral dynamics in trained recurrent networks
- Three-regime empirical taxonomy: Gated Precession, Critical Fluidity, Frozen Transport

## Forthcoming publications

- "Self-Encoding Geometry on Clifford Manifolds: Dimension Selection from the Lambert W Function" — target: Journal of Mathematical Physics. Status: in revision.
- "Architecture-Dependent Spectral Dynamics in Trained Recurrent Networks" — target: computational neuroscience / ML theory venue.

## Code

- https://github.com/AEO-TRIVECTOR/aeo-trivector — this website
- https://github.com/Orion-sextant/the-manifold — companion codebase
